description: Lock metadata written to the lock file. Shared across local and remote backends.

acquired_at_epoch_secs.description: Unix epoch seconds when the lock was acquired.

execution_id.description: Execution ID of the sync run that acquired the lock. Correlates with the execution_id in sync logs.

ttl_secs.description: Time-to-live in seconds; the lock expires after this duration.

title: LockInfo
